name: Aeon Disk
description: A powerful artifact long ago smuggled out of the Ivory Incubarium. Or so many believe.

abilities.name: Combo Breaker
abilities.description: When the wielder's health is below the threshold and they take player-based damage, applies a strong dispel and a buff on the wielder that provides status resistance and negates all damage the wielder takes, but also negates any damage they deal while active. Cooldown: 105/125/145/165. Mana Cost: 0. Health Threshold: 70%. Incoming Damage Reduction: 100%. Outgoing Damage Reduction: 100%. The ability cooldown increases per trigger and is bound to the wielder. Rebuying the item does not reset the ability cooldown.
